src: Clean architecture flutter: A Flutter package that makes it easy and intuitive to implement Uncle Bob's Clean Architecture in Flutter. This package provides basic classes that are tuned to work with Flutter and are designed according to the Clean Architecture.
ja: Flutter でのクリーンアーキテクチャ実装を簡単かつ直感的にする Flutter パッケージ。Uncle Bob のクリーンアーキテクチャに基づいて設計された Flutter 向け基底クラスを提供。
